name: Party Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tomatoes, tomatillos, onion, green onions, green peppers, jalapeno chile, yellow chiles, cilantro, garlic, and hot pepper sauce in a bowl.
2. Add the vinegar and stir well to combine.
3. Blend the mixture until smooth and season with salt to taste.
4. Refrigerate at least an hour before serving. Makes about 7 cups.
